text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when Mejiro Ardan and I have completed the
day's training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: May I run a little while longer, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You see, one of my classmates said she
experienced something otherworldly on the track
after sundown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she heard footsteps closing in on her
from behind while she was running. When she
looked around, though, there was nobody there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There is that saying, "A fearful heart sees devils in
the dark"... but I'd quite like to discover the
source of these supposed footsteps.
choice_data_list: Too much running. I can't let you do that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then I take it I have your permission? Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall inform you tomorrow as to whether I've
encountered any specters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Ardan continues running laps
around the track well into the night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I see your point. Insufficient rest can lead to
injury after all. I shan't run for the rest of the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'll ascertain any supernatural goings-on
while doing my cool-down stretches and icing my
joints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan's investigation fails to
turn up any ghosts, it at least proves a good
alternative to excessive training.
